steps.title: Apply the equation from the given condition
Use the source rationale
steps.content: The correct answer is $294$. Subtracting $18$ from each side of the given equation yields $\frac{6}{7}p=36$. Multiplying each side of this equation by $\frac{7}{6}$ yields $p=42$. Multiplying each side of this equation by $7$ yields $7p=294$. Therefore, the value of $7p$ is $294$.
